name: Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped spinach, drained thoroughly
1 medium vidalia onion, quartered and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Saute onion in butter until translucent.
3. Layer spinach, onion, ham, mushrooms, bacon, and Swiss cheese in the pie shell.
4. In a bowl, combine eggs, heavy cream, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and mix thoroughly without overbeating to avoid foam.
5. Pour egg mixture over the layered ingredients in the pie shell.
6. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake an additional 40 minutes.
